sbi-website.description: Custom website for Sarah Beach Interiors, an interior design studio.

NC-Agent-Core.description: Shared agent engine powering Alfred and Viggo — handles scheduling, tool routing, and Telegram integration across NC LLC agents.

left-vs-right-brain.description: Left vs Right Brain — an AI podcast by Greg and Chase.

the-daily-chase.description: My long running home on the internet. Started as a WordPress blog in 2013 and has evolved through many versions into a place to document what I'm building, learning, and thinking about.

visitmariemont.description: An interactive itinerary builder I use to plan personalized visits for friends and family coming to town. Restaurants, walks, coffee, and the perfect day mapped out.

potofhugga.description: A St. Patrick's Day scavenger hunt experience at Hugga Retreats. Guests explore the trails, solve clues, and hunt for hidden gold across the property.

hugga.description: Hugga internal team app for turnovers, QA, and guest feedback.

NCLLC-Alfred.description: Personal operations coordinator. Handles daily check-ins, health tracking, and weekly reviews via Telegram.

NCLLC-Viggo.description: Automated guest messaging agent for Hugga Retreats. Handles inbound Hostfully messages and drafts responses.

hugga-picklelodge-partnership.description: Partnership between Hugga and The Pickle Lodge to cross-promote both brands and reach each other's customer base.

hugga-retreats-website.description: 42 acres with four cabins in Hocking Hills.

guests-first-ios.description: App for Hugga team to keep track of cleans, maintenance, and guest feedback.

hugga-integrations.description: Hostfully pre-arrival form to Mailchimp sync for Hugga Retreats guest communications.

hugga-email-newsletter.description: Email newsletter system for Hugga Retreats — welcome series, seasonal campaigns, and The Slow Post editorial newsletter.

leucadia.description: Curiosity driven initiative to figure out where Encinitas ends and Leucadia begins.
